audit_items.proof_trace: Data columns from Engine API are discarded: processBlock hardcodes Opt.none(DataColumnSidecars) at line 896 instead of passing entry.columns to storeBlock, causing API-sourced columns to skip gossip validation (validateDataColumnSidecar) that gossip-sourced columns receive.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Validator imports block with malformed data columns via Engine API; columns bypass KZG proof verification and inclusion proof checks that gossip path enforces, causing incorrect blob availability tracking and potential consensus divergence.
